* ARGUED & tentative ruling adopted -- Defendant Majestic Insurance Co.'s demurrer to complaint is OVERRULED -- no basis for claimed barr by the statute of limitation because complaint does not allege date of breach. Pursuant request of counsel for defendant, the Court ordered both defendants (Majestic Insurance Co. And MHG Adusting Co.) to file answer within the time frame required under California law. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (AJR/301/MD) Hon. A. JAMES ROBERTSON II (301) Patricia Evezich, CSR 1193
